title: Living in Bouder vlog 1 -  15  - 2017: Showing my Denarius from Antoninus Pius

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder, sharing updates on his Minecraft/3D modeling project recreating ancient Rome, particularly the Colosseum. He then shows off a Roman denarius coin featuring Antoninus Pius that his mom gave him for his birthday, reflecting on its historical significance and his personal memories of visiting Rome.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: His model will be superior because you can actually enter and navigate it, unlike Google's SketchUp version
Finds it remarkable and meaningful to own a piece of actual Roman history that still looks like a modern coin
Deeply impressed that Roman culture and language (Latin) connects directly to the present day
